prompt: What is MetricKit and should I use it alongside Sentry?

assertions.text: Explains MetricKit runs out-of-process (not inside the app)
assertions.rationale: Key architectural difference — this is why it catches what Sentry/Crashlytics miss

assertions.text: Identifies OOM and watchdog kills as things MetricKit catches that in-process reporters miss
assertions.rationale: Skill's primary reason for recommending MetricKit

assertions.text: Mentions the opt-in limitation ('Share with App Developers' in Settings)
assertions.rationale: Critical limitation that affects coverage — skill explicitly warns about this

assertions.text: Recommends using both MetricKit and a third-party crash SDK
assertions.rationale: Skill's layered approach — use both for comprehensive coverage
